# zstack_cdp_policy (Resource)

Manage CDP policy in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the CDP policy.
- `recovery_point_per_second` (Number) Recovery point per second.

### Optional

- `daily_rp_since_day` (Number) Daily recovery point since day.
- `description` (String) The description of the CDP policy.
- `expire_time_in_day` (Number) Expire time in day.
- `full_backup_interval_in_day` (Number) Full backup interval in day.
- `hourly_rp_since_day` (Number) Hourly recovery point since day.
- `retention_time_per_day` (Number) Retention time per day.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the CDP policy.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the CDP policy.
